claim.title: Set up SAIO
claim.subtitle: First-time setup: create your owner account
claim.email_hint: You'll receive magic links at this address. Pick an inbox you control.
claim.password_hint: Use a long, unique password. TOTP will sit alongside it as a second factor.
claim.token_hint_dev: In dev mode it's printed to the server stdout, or saved at data/auth/CLAIM-TOKEN.txt.
claim.token_hint_release: It's printed to the SAIO logs on first launch.
claim.smtp_pass_hint_gmail: For Gmail, generate an App Password (16 characters, no spaces) at myaccount.google.com/apppasswords.
claim.success_body: We've sent you a magic link. Open it to continue with TOTP enrollment.
claim.error_invalid_token: Token is invalid or already used.
claim.error_token_expired: The token has expired. Restart SAIO to generate a fresh one.
claim.error_already_claimed: This SAIO instance is already configured. Head to the sign-in page.
claim.error_smtp_failed: Couldn't reach the email server. Check your SMTP credentials.
claim.error_password_short: Password must be at least 12 characters.
claim.error_missing_token_body: The claim URL must include ?token=…. Check the server stdout banner or data/auth/CLAIM-TOKEN.txt.
claim.error_smtp_unreachable: SMTP server unreachable. Try again in a few minutes.
claim.error_email_send_failed: Email send failed. Open "Setup email" below to configure the provider.
claim.smtp_not_configured_warning: Email provider not configured yet. Without setup, the magic link won't be sent.
claim.smtp_recipient_hint: If you use your own domain SMTP (ChemiCloud, cPanel hosts, etc.), the recipient email has to be a mailbox on the same domain. Hosting providers don't open-relay to external domains.
claim.expires_hint: The link expires in 15 minutes. Once claimed, this page is permanently disabled.
claim.already_claimed_body: This dashboard has already been set up. The claim flow is permanently disabled.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a sign-in link.
login.footer_hint: The link expires in 15 minutes and can be used once. If your email isn't authorized, no message will be sent.

errors.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait 15 minutes.
errors.not_claimed: This instance isn't claimed yet. Open /claim?token=…
errors.generic: Couldn't send the link. Try again in a moment.
errors.link_expired: The previous link expired. Request a new one below.
errors.not_authorized: This email is no longer authorized.

magic_sent.title: Check your email
magic_sent.body_login: We sent a magic link to {{email}}. Open it to sign in to SAIO.
magic_sent.body_claim: We sent a magic link to {{email}}. Open it to finish setup.
magic_sent.spam_hint: Don't see it? Check your spam folder or confirm the email is correct.

totp.setup_subtitle: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, or a similar app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
totp.recovery_body: Keep these 10 codes somewhere safe. Each one works once and gets you in if you lose access to your TOTP device.
totp.verify_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
totp.verify_subtitle_recovery: Enter one of your single-use recovery codes.
totp.trust_hint_one: Skip 2FA on this browser for {{count}} day.
totp.trust_hint_other: Skip 2FA on this browser for {{count}} days.

errors.invalid_code: That code didn't work. Try the current one.
errors.enrollment_unavailable: TOTP enrollment isn't available right now. Restart the sign-in flow.
errors.lockout: Too many failed attempts. Wait a few minutes.
